name: The Banshee
description: A wailing spirit that attacks through devastating sound. It resists physical blows but crumbles under ranged fire.

name: The Possessor
description: A fast rodent-formed spirit that skitters and bites. Hard to hit with ranged attacks but vulnerable to melee.

name: The Possessor
description: A fast rodent-formed spirit that skitters and bites. Hard to hit with ranged attacks but vulnerable to melee.

name: The Possessor
description: A well-rounded spirit that balances speed and power. Difficult to reach with melee but susceptible to ranged damage.

name: The Poltergeist
description: A ghost that hurls objects with violent force. Has no particular weakness to weapon type but can barricade a door on retreat.

name: The Possessor
description: A slow hulking spirit that trades speed for devastating power. Ranged weapons barely scratch it but melee and ranged accuracy both cut through its defences.

name: The Shadow
description: A darkness-formed ghost that grows stronger at night. Carrying a light source weakens its attacks. More accurate inside buildings.

name: The Freak
description: An unsettling anomaly that does not behave like any known ghost. It can summon allies and fights dirty until it decides to run.
